recommendations.title: Choose Love
recommendations.overview: The steady boyfriend. The one who got away. The charming rock star. Who will Cami choose? In this interactive rom-com, her love life is in your hands.

recommendations.title: Something New
recommendations.overview: Lucia and Maria are two best friends, who have known each other from the beginning of their life, but have very different tastes and behaviors. Lucia is done with men, Maria, on the contrary, cannot be without one. One night, the perfect man shows up

recommendations.title: The Great Beauty
recommendations.overview: Jep Gambardella has seduced his way through the lavish nightlife of Rome for decades, but after his 65th birthday and a shock from the past, Jep looks past the nightclubs and parties to find a timeless landscape of absurd, exquisite beauty.

recommendations.title: Old Dads
recommendations.overview: A cranky middle-aged dad and his two best friends find themselves out of step in a changing world of millennial CEOs and powerful preschool principals.

recommendations.title: Houseboat
recommendations.overview: An Italian socialite on the run signs on as housekeeper for a widower with three children.

recommendations.title: Fala Sério, Mãe!
recommendations.overview: Ângela Cristina, mother of teenager Maria de Lourdes, has to deal with the difficulties and delights of guiding her daughter during one of the most complicated stages of life.

recommendations.title: Repli-Kate
recommendations.overview: A scientist and his sidekick accidentally clone a journalist and decide to turn the mistake into Repli-Kate, their idea of the perfect woman, who loves, beer, football, and frat parties.

recommendations.title: I Do...Knot

recommendations.title: Tifosi
recommendations.overview: Four different stories about italian football team’s supporter.

recommendations.title: On a Magical Night
